debug_info.goal:
S : LightProfinite
inst✝ : Nonempty ↑S.toTop
⊢ Injective (lightToProfinite.obj S)

failed_attempts:
by
    let S_cone := lightToProfinite.mapCone S.asLimit.cone
    let S_lim : IsLimit S_cone := (CompHausLike.isLimit_iff_isLimit_drop _).mpr <|
      (CompHausLike.isLimit_iff_isLimit_drop _).mp S.asLimit.isLimit
    let g_proj n := g ≫ S_cone.π.app (Opposite.op n)
    have h_step (n : ℕ) (k : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n)) (h_down : f ≫ k = g_proj n) :
      ∃ k' : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component (n+1)), k' ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) = k ∧ f ≫ k' = g_proj (n+1) := by
      haveI : Epi (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)) := (epi_iff_surjective _).mpr (S.surjective_transitionMap n)
      refine Profinite.profinite_key_extension_lemma X Y _ _ f (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)) (g_proj (n+1)) k ?_
      rw [g_proj, g_proj, ← Category.assoc, ← lightToProfinite.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap, h_down]
    haveI : Nonempty (lightToProfinite.obj (S.component 0)) := Nonempty.map (lightToProfinite.map (S.proj 0)) inferInstance
    obtain ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ := Injective.factors (g_proj 0) f
    let kn (n : ℕ) : { k : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n) // f ≫ k = g_proj n } :=
      Nat.rec ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ (fun n k ↦ ⟨(h_step n k.1 k.2).choose, (h_step n k.1 k.2).choose_spec.2⟩) n
    let k_cone : Cone (S.diagram ⋙ FintypeCat.toProfinite) := {
      pt := Y,
      π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (kn n).1) (fun n ↦ (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n (kn n).1 (kn n).2)).1.symm) }
    exact ⟨S_lim.lift k_cone, S_lim.hom_ext (fun n ↦ by simp [g_proj, S_lim.fac, (kn n.unop).2])⟩

    haveI (n : ℕ) : Epi (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)) :=

      (let ⟨k0, h0⟩ := Injective.factors (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj 0)) f; ⟨k0, h0⟩)
      (fun n k ↦ ⟨Classical.choose (h_step n k.val k.property), (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n k.val k.property)).2⟩) n
    let k_cone : Cone (S.diagram ⋙ FintypeCat.toProfinite) := { pt := Y,
      π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (k_seq n).val)

        (by rw [hk, g', ← lightToProfinite.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap])
    let lifts n := { k : Y ⟶ S_ n // f ≫ k = g' n }
    let k_seq n : lifts n := Nat.rec ⟨k0, h0⟩ (fun n k ↦ ⟨Classical.choose (h_step n k.1 k.2), (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n k.1 k.2)).2⟩) n

      π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (k_seq n).1) (fun n ↦ (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n (k_seq n).1 (k_seq n).2)).1.symm) }
    use S.asLimit.lift k_cone
    rw [S.asLimit.uniq (S.asLimit.cone.extend g) g (fun n ↦ rfl)]
    apply S.asLimit.uniq (S.asLimit.cone.extend g)
    intro n
    simp [k_cone, (k_seq n.unop).2]

    have h_step (n : ℕ) (k : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n)) (h_down : f ≫ k = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n)) :
      ∃ k' : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component (n+1)), k' ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) = k ∧ f ≫ k' = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1)) := by
      have h_comm : f ≫ k = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1)) ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) := by
        rw [h_down, ← lightToProfinite.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap]
      exact profinite_key_extension_lemma _ _ _ _ f (lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n)) (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1))) k h_comm
    let lifts (n : ℕ) := { k : Y ⟶ lightToProfinite.obj (S.component n) // f ≫ k = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n) }
    let next (n : ℕ) : lifts n → lifts (n+1) :=
      fun k ↦ ⟨Classical.choose (h_step n k.val k.property), (Classical.choose_spec (h_step n k.val k.property)).2⟩
    let k_seq (n : Nat) : lifts n := Nat.rec ⟨k0, h_down0⟩ next n
    have h_down (n : ℕ) : f ≫ (k_seq n).val = g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj n) := (k_seq n).property
    have h_up (n : ℕ) : (k_seq (n+1)).val ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.transitionMap n) = (k_seq n).val := by
      induction n with
      | zero => exact (Classical.choose_spec (h_step 0 k0 h_down0)).1
      | succ n ih => exact (Classical.choose_spec (h_step (n+1) (k_seq (n+1)).val (k_seq (n+1)).property)).1
    let k_cone : Cone (S.diagram ⋙ lightToProfinite) :=
      { pt := Y, π := NatTrans.ofOpSequence (fun n ↦ (k_seq n).val) (fun n ↦ (h_up n).symm) }
    let hL := isLimitOfPreserves lightToProfinite S.asLimit
    use hL.lift k_cone
    apply hL.hom_ext
    intro n
    simp [h_down, hL.fac]

end LightProfinite

by

    haveI (n : ℕ) : Epi (L.map (S.transitionMap n)) := (Profinite.epi_iff_surjective _).mpr (S.surjective_transitionMap n)

      obtain ⟨k', h1, h2⟩ := profinite_key_extension_lemma _ _ _ _ f (L.map (S.transitionMap n)) (g ≫ L.map (S.proj (n+1))) k.1 (by rw [k.2, ← L.map_comp, S.proj_comp_transitionMap])
      exact ⟨⟨k', h2⟩, h1⟩

    let k_seq n := Nat.rec (⟨Classical.choose k0, Classical.choose_spec k0⟩ : lifts 0) (fun n k ↦ Classical.choose (h_step n k)) n

    use hS.lift k_cone
    apply hS.uniq (k_cone.extend f) g
    intro n; simp [k_cone, (k_seq n.unop).2]

      (g ≫ lightToProfinite.map (S.proj (n+1))) k (by

    intro n; simp [show k_cone.π.app n = (k_seq n.unop).1 from rfl, (k_seq n.unop).2]
